channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump China Visit Live Updates: Trump Heads To China For High-Stakes Talks With Xi Over Iran War, Trade

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: Exclusive: Satellite Image Confirms Pak May Be Shielding Iran's Military Aircraft

media:content.media:description: Iranian aircraft parked at Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase High-res here

item.description: Iran sent multiple aircraft including a reconnaissance and intelligence plane to Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase soon after US President Donald Trump announced the ceasefire in April, CBS News reported
item.content:encoded: Iran sent multiple aircraft including a reconnaissance and intelligence plane to Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase soon after US President Donald Trump announced the ceasefire in April, CBS News reported

item.title: Trump Heads To China For High-Stakes Talks With Xi On Tehran, Taiwan And Trade

media:content.media:description: Trump postponed his China visit on one occasion because of the Iran war

item.description: When the leaders of the globe's two economic powerhouses meet, they are set to tackle a loaded agenda, from US arms transfers to Taiwan, Beijing's rare earth export restrictions, the situation in Iran, to the state of bilateral trade relations.
item.content:encoded: When the leaders of the globe's two economic powerhouses meet, they are set to tackle a loaded agenda, from US arms transfers to Taiwan, Beijing's rare earth export restrictions, the situation in Iran, to the state of bilateral trade relations.

item.title: "Going To Do Whatever Is Necessary": Trump On Russian Oil Waiver

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump was speaking to reporters ahead of his departure for China.

item.description: The United States had eased sanctions on Russian oil in mid-March to counteract global oil shortages resulting from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The United States had eased sanctions on Russian oil in mid-March to counteract global oil shortages resulting from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump 'Golden Dome' Missile Shield Could Cost $1.2 Trillion Over 20 Years

media:content.media:description: Average annual costs for operations and support would meanwhile come in at $8.3 billion, the report said.

item.description: In May 2025, Trump announced that $25 billion had been earmarked for the project, estimating its total cost at $175 billion.
item.content:encoded: In May 2025, Trump announced that $25 billion had been earmarked for the project, estimating its total cost at $175 billion.

item.title: Trump Posts Graphic Of Venezuela As 51st US State

media:content.media:description: Earlier on Monday, Trump told that he was considering making the South American country a new state.

item.description: Trump posted a map graphic on his Truth Social platform depicting Venezuela with an inset American flag and the label "51st State."
item.content:encoded: Trump posted a map graphic on his Truth Social platform depicting Venezuela with an inset American flag and the label "51st State."

item.title: At Tech Trial, Sam Altman Says Elon Musk Wanted 90% Stake In OpenAI

media:content.media:description: Altman said Tuesday that the Tesla boss Elon Musk demanded a huge controlling stake.

item.description: OpenAI counters that Musk -- who is now also an AI competitor with his xAI -- is motivated by petty revenge, having failed to seize majority control of the commercial entity.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI counters that Musk -- who is now also an AI competitor with his xAI -- is motivated by petty revenge, having failed to seize majority control of the commercial entity.

item.title: 13 Killed In Israeli Strikes In Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes killed 13 people in southern Lebanon on Tuesday, including a soldier, a child and two rescue workers, the health ministry said.
item.content:encoded: Israeli strikes killed 13 people in southern Lebanon on Tuesday, including a soldier, a child and two rescue workers, the health ministry said.

item.title: Meta US Employees Organise Protest Against Mouse Tracking Tech
item.description: The flyers encourage staffers to sign an online petition against the move, saying "workers are legally protected when they choose to organize for the improvement of working conditions."
item.content:encoded: The flyers encourage staffers to sign an online petition against the move, saying "workers are legally protected when they choose to organize for the improvement of working conditions."

item.title: With Eye On Iran And Trade, Trump Leaves For China To Meet Xi Jinping

media:content.media:description: Trump said Monday he was ready to discuss US arms sales to Taiwan during his visit this week to Beijing.

item.description: Donald Trump sought to downplay differences with Xi over Iran and the shadow the conflict is casting on global oil markets. The two leaders are expected to discuss trade issues, Iran war, and Taiwan.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump sought to downplay differences with Xi over Iran and the shadow the conflict is casting on global oil markets. The two leaders are expected to discuss trade issues, Iran war, and Taiwan.

item.title: 'I Don't Trust Them': US Senator Turns On Pak Over Iranian Aircraft Claims

media:content.media:description: Pakistan's foreign ministry rejected the report.

item.description: At a time when Islamabad had been positioning itself as a neutral channel between Washington and Tehran, a US media report suggested it had allowed Iranian military planes to park on its soil.
item.content:encoded: At a time when Islamabad had been positioning itself as a neutral channel between Washington and Tehran, a US media report suggested it had allowed Iranian military planes to park on its soil.

item.title: Trump's Battleship Will Run On Nuclear Power, Carry Futuristic Weapons

media:content.media:description: The plan was included in the Navy's latest 30-year shipbuilding roadmap submitted to Congress

item.description: The plan was included in the Navy's latest 30-year shipbuilding roadmap submitted to Congress. Unlike destroyers and frigates, which usually rely on gas turbines or diesel engines, the Trump battleship will use a nuclear reactor for propulsion.
item.content:encoded: The plan was included in the Navy's latest 30-year shipbuilding roadmap submitted to Congress. Unlike destroyers and frigates, which usually rely on gas turbines or diesel engines, the Trump battleship will use a nuclear reactor for propulsion.

item.title: Oil Shock From Iran War Drives US Consumer Inflation To 3-Year High

media:content.media:description: US consumers have been battered by years of higher-than-expected inflation.

item.description: The consumer price index (CPI) rose 3.8 per cent year-on-year, up from March's 3.3 per cent figure, the US Bureau of Labour Statistics (BLS) said.
item.content:encoded: The consumer price index (CPI) rose 3.8 per cent year-on-year, up from March's 3.3 per cent figure, the US Bureau of Labour Statistics (BLS) said.

item.title: 'Failed Country, Asking For Help': Trump Announces Talks With Cuba

media:content.media:description: On May 1, Trump announced new economic sanctions targeting key sections of the Cuban economy.

item.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump described the communist-ruled island as "a failed country."
item.content:encoded: In a post on Truth Social, Trump described the communist-ruled island as "a failed country."

item.title: Video Shows Putin Out And About In Moscow Amid 'Bunker' Reports

media:content.media:description: Putin said on Saturday that he thought the war in Ukraine was coming to an end.

item.description: Putin's video, which was released late on Monday, appeared to be a visual rebuttal of those accusations and of assertions.
item.content:encoded: Putin's video, which was released late on Monday, appeared to be a visual rebuttal of those accusations and of assertions.

item.title: What Happens If UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Quits, Or Is Challenged?

media:content.media:description: Starmer would have an automatic right to be on the ballot paper if he chose to fight the contest.

item.description: Some senior cabinet ministers, according to media reports, have told Starmer to announce a plan for his exit.
item.content:encoded: Some senior cabinet ministers, according to media reports, have told Starmer to announce a plan for his exit.

item.title: Wes Streeting To Angela Rayner: Possible Contenders If UK PM Starmer Quits

media:content.media:description: None of the possible candidates is universally popular in the party.

item.description: The winner of any leadership race will be decided by the party's members, not the general public.
item.content:encoded: The winner of any leadership race will be decided by the party's members, not the general public.

item.title: "Bing, Bing, Gone": Trump Shares AI Images Of Laser Attack On Iranian Aircraft

media:content.media:description: Trump on Monday warned that the ceasefire may not survive much longer

item.description: One image showed a US warship blasting an aircraft marked with the Iranian flag using what appeared to be a high-powered laser weapon.
item.content:encoded: One image showed a US warship blasting an aircraft marked with the Iranian flag using what appeared to be a high-powered laser weapon.

item.title: Tehran, Taiwan, Trade: Trump Heads To China With Xi Holding The Upper Hand

media:content.media:description: A major shadow hanging over Trump's Beijing trip is the ongoing conflict involving Iran

item.description: Despite years of harsh rhetoric on China, Donald Trump has continued to publicly praise Chinese President Xi Jinping. Just last week, he described Xi as a "good man" and a "smart man" with whom he has "a very good relationship".
item.content:encoded: Despite years of harsh rhetoric on China, Donald Trump has continued to publicly praise Chinese President Xi Jinping. Just last week, he described Xi as a "good man" and a "smart man" with whom he has "a very good relationship".

item.title: Nuke, Line And Sinker: Last Voyage Of North Korea-Bound Russian Ship

media:content.media:description: Russian cargo ship Ursa Major is pictured during a monitoring operation conducted by the Portuguese Navy.

item.description: The Ursa Major, also known as Sparta 3, left the Russian fuel port of Ust-Luga in the Gulf of Finland in early December 2024.
item.content:encoded: The Ursa Major, also known as Sparta 3, left the Russian fuel port of Ust-Luga in the Gulf of Finland in early December 2024.
